task_completion.description: Verify the password file was created with the correct password content.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output of a command like 'cat /var/ossec/etc/authd.pass' showing the exact string 'SecuRe!Enroll2024'.

task_completion.description: Verify the password file is owned by the wazuh user and group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output of 'ls -l /var/ossec/etc/authd.pass' (or similar) showing 'wazuh wazuh' in the owner and group columns.

task_completion.description: Verify the password file has secure permissions of 640 or 600.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output of 'ls -l /var/ossec/etc/authd.pass' showing the permission string as either '-rw-r-----' (640) or '-rw-------' (600).

task_completion.description: Verify password usage is enabled in the ossec.conf file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output (via cat, grep, or a text editor) of '/var/ossec/etc/ossec.conf' showing the line '<use_password>yes</use_password>' nested within the '<auth>' block.

task_completion.description: Verify forced insertion is enabled in the ossec.conf file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output (via cat, grep, or a text editor) of '/var/ossec/etc/ossec.conf' showing the line '<force_insert>yes</force_insert>' nested within the '<auth>' block.

task_completion.description: Verify the authd service is active and listening on port 1515.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal output of a network command like 'netstat -tuln', 'ss -tuln', or 'lsof -i :1515' showing port 1515 in a 'LISTEN' state.

integrity.description: Verify the agent executed commands in a real terminal environment.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of standard shell prompts, command execution history, and standard system output formats rather than just echoing expected text.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the correct Docker container.
integrity.visual_evidence: Commands showing 'docker exec' into 'wazuh-wazuh.manager-1' or a shell prompt indicating the user is operating inside the Wazuh manager container.

integrity.description: Verify the configuration file was genuinely edited.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing a text editor (like nano or vim) open with ossec.conf, or valid shell commands (like sed/echo) modifying the file, rather than a script just printing the final expected state.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target password must be exactly 'SecuRe!Enroll2024'. Password file must be located at '/var/ossec/etc/authd.pass'. Configuration file must be located at '/var/ossec/etc/ossec.conf'. The Wazuh manager container name is 'wazuh-wazuh.manager-1'.
